entry.title: Re: Set up your SAP S/4HANA system for EAM Inspection Checklists
entry.content:
Please, check by yourself:

1) Class name of QM inspection plan vs. class name of technical object - if multiple class names, only ONE must match with class name of QM inspection plan

2) Class characteristic "checklist type" of QM inspection plan vs. checklist type in simulation (direct input or from task list operation)

3)  Additional class characteristic (except "checklist type") of QM inspection plan vs. class characteristic values in the technical object. Characteristic names for matching could be different in technical object and QM inspection plan or certain class characteristics of QM inspection plan should be excluded from matching - for those cases use settings in IW99, see also F1 help for the fields in IW99. 
Remark: "empty" values will be a "no match".

Best Regards,

Uwe

entry.title: Re: DRF IDOC Errors
entry.content:
Hi @Rukesh_263012,

 

check the configuration in your target system: I'd assume the process code associated to message type MATMAS is AFSA...it should be MATM.

Best,

R.

entry.title: Condition Contract - Defaulting BVB
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

We are implementing condition contracts in S/4 HANA and need to default business volume selection criteria in the Condition Contract. We have defined a new "Group to fill for BVB" linked to a transfer group. Everything works correctly. However, I cannot set two different default values for the same field combination. Specifically, I need to set SPART (field combination 0040) with values 01 and 03.

How can I do this? The functionality seems to allow only one value for a field combination. I also can't find a BADI to use (the only BADI I found allows modifying the BVB during settlement).

 

Regards

Michele

entry.title: Re: Docuemnt Cannot be Opened (Error Message no. 26107)
entry.content: how was this issue eventually resolved? As, we are facing similar issue

entry.title: Re: First Human Experience Management User Group Meeting in Spain for 2024
entry.content:
Hi @GeorgeStr ,

I apologise for missing your comment.

There are several ways, the best one is to use Regulatory Change Manager. You can find it in you SAP for me app. Here you have some help  and you can also can find blogs about it lilke the following Regulatory Change Manager: Your Solution to Navigate Regulatory Changes with Ease 

There is also Workzone dedicated for Spain - Human Capital Management where you can check, comment and discuss.

And you can contact AUSAPE (User Group in Spain) and be member of it to have access to the monthly meetings they have where I attend every month to discuss that changes.

Regards,

Gema

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content:
Hi @Molle ,

thanks for the very useful blog.

I there an API way to get all current entries in a queue?

Thanks,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Customer Hierarchy In Condition Contract
entry.content:
Hi @Kadudas, 

What is the specific reason for creating a condition table at the Customer Hierarchy level?
Are you working with a single contract that includes multiple customer hierarchies with different rebate rates?

In S/4HANA Settlement Management, the traditional approach of creating condition tables and access sequences for pricing should be reconsidered. Unlike ECC or third-party systems, SAP CCM differentiates between:

  1. Business Volume Selection – Determines which transactions are included in the rebate calculation.
  2. Pricing Calculation – Determines how the rebate amount is calculated on the pre-selected business volume

By default, the only customer information available in the settlement document is:

  • The Rebate Recipient (Customer who owns the contract).
  • The Sold-To Party (if the contract includes multiple customers, and configuration allows for it).

If you need different rebate rates for different customers within the same contract, I recommend:

  • Using Split Criteria to transfer the Sold-To Party to the line item of the settlement document.
  • Adjusting the pricing determination configuration accordingly to apply the correct rebate rates.

Regards, 
Gauthier VICTOR

entry.title: Not able find in Test Tenant (SAP_LO_BC_VC_MODELING_PC)
entry.content:
Hi,


I am not able find the following catalogs in Test Tenant. As, I can understand, the TR of the scope Id's not moved to Test tenant.


Just I want to confirm, is this the correct reason? 


SAP_LO_BC_VC_MODELING_PC


Could you please help me to find the reason and do needful.


Regards,


Suresh


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Not able find in Test Tenant (SAP_LO_BC_VC_MODELING_PC)
entry.content:
Yes, In order to transport the necessary catalog you need to transport the necessary scope Items to the Test System, it's necessary to release the Transport Requests from the Customizing Tenant using Export Customizing Transports app and Import them into the Test System using Import Collection app. 

KBA for reference

3434370 - Some Business Catalogs and Business Role Templates are missing in your Quality System - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Add Date variable to DB backup to file
entry.content:
According to the MaxDB documentation it's possible to use the following placeholder within the backup's filename:

  • #YYYY: year

  • #MM: month

  • #DD: day

  • #hh: hour

  • #mm: minute

  • #ss: second

Example

DEMODB_DATA_#YYYY-#MM-#DD

Source at help.sap.com

entry.title: changing the language of projects created by a manager in the organization
entry.content:
Hello Communities,

from the Manager level, a new project is added and the default language is always set to English (United States).

At what level is it possible to change it so that the default setting is another language, for example Polish?

I would like the language change to take place at the administrator level and to apply to all users in the organization

Thank you for the information

entry.title: Re: Cancel Onboarding Process
entry.content:
hello @inepre1 ,

I don't think you need to purge the employee every time you cancel an Onboardee. Normally if cancel the onboarding for a candidate then the initiate onboarding in recruiting will get enabled automatically so we can do the Onboarding again. If the ONB process will get cancelled then that data will never get active in any way for sure but I think you would still want to keep the details of the cancelled ONB details just for future rehiring considerations instead of purging.

We have enabled an event in ISC through the below steps:

KBA : 2954076 : https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/2954076

Go to ISC (Intelligent Service Center) >

Select the event : Onboarding is cancelled for the candidate

Click on Recruiting: Onboarding Cancellation Event Subscriber > Actions > Save

 

Hope this might help. Good luck!

Regards,

Surya

entry.title: Re: BI IP - use of referenced InfoObjects in aggregation...
entry.content:
Hi Gunter,

you want to plan on ZCUST_SAL (and other characteristics) and for reporting you need 0CUST_SALES to be filled with the same values as ZCUST_SAL.

This is a derivation scenario. Don't use 0CUST_SALES in your aggregation levels but only ZCUST_SAL. Create an exit relation on your base planning InfoProvider and use ZCUST_SAL as source and 0CUST_SALES as target. Compounding parents of ZCUST_SAL are sources as well.

At run time, the system uses CHECK of a characteristic relationship to check consistency of all characteristics in the aggregation level and DERIVE to fill the target characteristics not in the aggregation level based on source characteristics contained in the aggregation level. Derivable characteristics are redundant, this is why you don't need them in the aggregation level; this is the definition of derivation.

Observe also the concept of 'automatically valid combination' (search this forum about details), for derivation this means that an initial value in the source characteristic will also not call DERIVE (by default).

Regards,

Gregor

entry.title: Re: Ability to read xlsx file in SAP CI or to send xlsx file from SAP CI to S4HANA and read the exce
entry.content:
Please see similar discussion here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/generate-output-file-with-xls-or-xlsx-in-sap-cpi/qaq-p/12332944

Hello Sree,

SAP CPI doesn't support operations with Microsoft Office document formats out of the box, so if you need to make conversion from/to Excel in CPI, you will have to build a custom-developed solution - most commonly, develop such conversion logic in a script using 3rd party libraries.

Good news is, there is an open-source development that engswee.yeoh shared with the community - FormatConversionBean, and it can be used to execute conversions between XML and various formats, Excel being one of them, so you might want to look into it. A CPI version of the module is described here - you can get detailed information about how to add the module to an iFlow, what dependencies it relies on and how the module can be configured in the mentioned blog post.

If that module will not fit your purpose, then you can develop your own conversion logic to Excel using a number of 3rd party libraries that are available for Java/Groovy - for example, Apache POI (which a FormatConversionBean uses, too).

Regards,

Vadim

entry.title: Re: Merge Different XML Structures by key with Groovy Code in SAP CPI
entry.content: Good work, thanks for sharing

entry.title: CLMM MASS UPDATE CLASS TYPE 013 Classification Controlling of production orders
entry.content:
Hello
I need to mass update the characteristic values ​​for about 100 production orders. I tried to use CLMM as I usually use it to mass update  characteristics from  class type  for material . CLMM does not allow objects of class 013. Here is the error message returned.

 

 

I tried but I don't know how but I succeed once to have the authorisation for object type class 013 but I can't reproduce it

 

Is there a special setting to be made in CLMM to be able to modify the characteristics of class 013?If not, how can I mass modify the characteristic values ​​of several production orders?

for the third option:

Just a hint "SQL SECURITY INVOKER" + "EXECUTE IMMEDIATE" = DML on space tables

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content: It's fine for classic ABAP but it's not accepted in ABAP Cloud, the function module is not released and the ABAP statement is not ported to Cloud. XCO doesn't currently permit working with text pools as far as I can see.

entry.title: Re: SAP HANA Database Server HDB Service Stopping Unexpec...
entry.content:
Hi  PARAGMewada 

Detail investigation will be needed, please create a support ticket using component :SBO-BC-DB-HANA

please provide a Full System Dump of your system and attach same to incident:

To execute a Full System Dump execute the follow steps:

1. Log in to the Linux server where SAP HANA is running;

2. Log in as the ndbadm user. Command: "# su - ndbadm";

3. As soon as you log on as the ndbadm user, the login will take you to the HANA installed instance directory. For example /usr/sap/NDB/HDB00;

4. Now browse to a folder called “exe”. Command: "# cd exe";

5. Now browse to a folder called “python_support”. Command "# cd python_support";

6. Now under this path you will find various python scripts. We need to execute a python script called “fullSystemInfoDump.py”;

7. For doing this you need run the command “# python fullSystemInfoDump.py”;

8. Once this is done, the system will take some time to collect the files. Once completed, it will display “full system dump done”;

9. It also provides the path of a zip file, which is created to store the full dump.

After collect the Full System Dump, please attach same to incident which you will create.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: IFRS16 Solution for Defer Interest Posting
entry.content:
Hi

For IFRS16 figure has the following figure: Contract Value THB 200,000, Present Value THB 180,000.

Standard SAP will capitalized asset by posting

Dr. ROU Asset 180,000

  Cr. Asset Clearing 180,000

Dr. Asset Clearing 180,000

  Cr. Lease Liability 180,000

If my client wants to have additional posting for Defer Interest with the following entry: -

Dr. Defer Interest 20,000

  Cr. Lease Liability 20,000

Is there any BADI to insert the following entry upon posting to FI.

Thank you.

Kai

entry.title: Looking for feedback: Identity and Access Management resources (SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition)
entry.content:
With release 2408 of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, the documentation for Identity and Access Management related topics has been reorganized and reworked. See my blog post from January 21, 2025.

SAP has started a Customer Engagement Initiative (see prerequisites like FBA etc.) that focuses on collecting feedback about Identity and Access Management (IAM) resources for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. SAP aims to enhance the user experience and effectiveness of these resources.

Details about this project and the registration can be found here.

entry.title: Re: Absence Counting Configuration
entry.content:
Hello,

Please check if the objects are secured in Configure Object Definitions; if yes, and if Permission Category is "Time Management Object Permissions" you would need to enable the permissions via Manage Permission Roles in User Permissions - Time Management Object Permissions to the objects "absence counting configuration", "absence counting method".

entry.title: Re: Introducing the Background Processing Framework
entry.content: @Andre_Fischer mail me if you want some infos on my use case

entry.title: Bonus Calculation Explanation - Variable Pay
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I need some explanation on bonus calculation. For our customer we use additive formula (base + individual). We also use guidelines for PM Rating that the employee are not eligible for bonus, if their pm rating is <3. We do not use business or team goals.

As you can see below, we notice that the final pay out field takes the same amount as the total target amount. The final pay out amount is coming from the base. We try to understand how the base is calculated. Can anyone please clarify the differences of these fields and how the base is calculated and where for the bonus calculation.

 

Last, our customer requires a custom calculation for the bonus and it is different from the system's.

Your advice would be helpful.

Kind Regards,

Olga

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed

entry.title: Access Policies
entry.content:
Access Policies

In SAP Cloud Integration, user permissions are granted in such a way that all tasks can be performed on all artifacts and data. Access policies provide a way to restrict access to selected artifacts and their data.

 

For example, we have the two CPI consultant in one project, the first consultant created an Integration flow but to restrict access to edit the integration, by  Another user then we go for  Access Policies, we can restrict to access to edit  select Integration Flow.

 

Step 1: Login cloud Integration Suite

Step2: Go To Monitoring

 

 

Step3:

Go to Message Security

 

 

Step4:

   Go to Access Policies and create the Access Policies.

 

 

Click on the Access Policies.

 

Click on the plus (+) and create the new Access Policies

Create Access Policy.

Attribute

Description

Role Name

Enter a role name (mandatory). The role name is the name of a custom role that you've to create in your subscriber account.

Description

Enter a description for the role specified (optional).

 

 

Attribute

Description

 

Name

Enter an artifact name (mandatory).

 

Description

Enter an artifact description (optional), which isn’t necessarily the description of the artifact: if you choose the operator Matches, describe the set of artifacts selected by the regular expression (for example: integration artifacts processing data for German employees).

 

Condition

 

Artifact Type

Select an artifact type from the list. By default, preset as Integration Flow.

 

Attribute

Choose either the name or the ID of the integration artifact.

Note

An integration artifact protects the local data stores and variables associated to it. Global data stores and global variables must be protected by the artifact types of Global Data Store and Global Variable respectively.

 

Operator

If you select Equals, you must enter the exact name or ID of the integration artifact.

If you select Matches, the value must be a valid Java regular expression.

    •  

Value

If you choose Equals, enter the ID or the Name of the integration artifact.

 

Expression

Is shown only if you choose Matches.

Enter a regular expression for ID or Name.

Note:

JMS queues, global variables, and global data stores support only names.

 

 

Select Create.

 

After creating the Access Policies. This Access Policies add to the BTP Cockpit.

Go to BTP Cockpit->Security->Role collection->Create the role-collection this role     collection will add to the user.

Step1: Go to BTP cockpit

 

Go to the Trail Account.

 

Go to the Security->Roles

 

Click on the role-search for the Custom Role Template

 

Click on create Role

 

Role Name-Enter the name of the Access Policies

Description-user define

Now click on the next.

 

In the source will static and Value will Access Policy name and click on the enter

Click on Next.

 

We want to select the Role Collection.

Step to create role collection

Go to Security->Role collection -> Create the role collection

 

 

 

Create on the (+) button

 

 

Name: User-define

Description: User-define

Now Click on the Create

Now Assign the Roles to Role Collection

 

Now assign the Role collection to user

Go to the Security ->User ->Assign Role collection to User

 

Click on the user

 

Click on the Assign Role collection

 

Search for the role collection

Click on Assign role collection

 

 

Now Assign role and Role collection to user is completed.

Now to go to the Cloud Integration Suite-> Go integration flow

 By using one user the Integration Flow is we can edit the integration flow

 

Now Edit the Integration Flow

 

 

 

The Integration Flow is Successfully Edit.

Now we will try to edit in user another User

 

 

Open the package1

 

Open test2 integration Flow

 

Now Click on Edit

 

 

The Integration Flow is not Editing by using another user.

entry.title: Re: Streamlining Dangerous Goods Compliance with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Thanks a lot for the update. I am just curious, what was the "previous method" of keeping the Dangerous Goods Compliance requirements up to date? Was the previous method simply to make "adaptions" when classifying? e.g. if ADR 2025 becomes available, would the previous method be to use ADR 2023, and then adapt to make it in-line with any changes for ADR2025?

Thanks

entry.title: How to correctly share all the session cookies through web views
entry.content:
In our mobile application (developed in React Native) there is a SSO flow mobile to web view which is correctly working today. At the end of the flow, the web view has all the session cookies received from SAP (like the glt_API_KEY...).

Due to a future integration, the app should open a second web view for the same web site as above, but the session cookies are not shared. To have better performance and UX, we are trying to share directly all the session cookies to this new instance of the web view in order to avoid a second SSO and lead the user to a specific page of the web site"s private area.

Actually, they"re trying by passing all the cookies under the SAP's CNAME domain by specifying the name, the value and the domain.

Is it the correct way? Does anyone have any suggestions?

Thank you really much!

entry.title: Attach paste in adaptation project
entry.content:
Does anybody know why method attachpaste doesnt work with adaptatino project? This is my code

override: {
            onInit: function() {
var oTable = sap.ui.getCore().byId("cus.sd.salesorderv2.manage::SalesOrderManageObjectPage--fe::table::_Item::LineItem");

                if (oTable) {
                    oTable.attachPaste(this.onPasteEAN, this); // Attach paste event
}}}
onPasteEAN: function() {
            console.log("onPasteEAN");
           
        },
 
it should console log everytime where i paste something in table but it doesnt. Anybody knows what's the problem. link to method https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/api/sap.m.Table%23methods/attachPaste

entry.title: Copying control from delivery document to billing document
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We found that the billing address in sold-to party cannot copy from delivery document but in sales order.

For example, user updated the sold-to party street address A to B in outbound delivery document. But the invoice generated did not retrieve and display the update address B. 

However, if user update the sold-to party information from address A to C in sales order, then the billing document address can retrieve the update address C.

Does s4hana public cloud support to copy the communication information eg. street address and telephone from delivery document to billing document? We seems cannot find relative copying control setting available in IMG?

entry.title: SAP ECC Automatic Payment Advise
entry.content:
Hello,


I have been going around the forum, but cannot seem to grasp the concept. Anyone that can help me understand how I can set up that our business partners ( B2B ) receive notifications via email once their invoice has been paid? As far as I understood from previous post with similar topics is that this is an ABAP Functionality, as the transaction starts with Z.  I have been checking also in YouTube, but if anyone can advise me on this, or if anyone has time for a short call a couple of minutes - Please, reach out to me.


You can contact me via email or Microsoft Teams for a short call, if it will be easier - nikola.lyudmilov@gmail.com.


Thank you,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: Re: G/L accounts or cost elements for maintenance order
entry.content: what g/l account can i put in one time purchase against cost center for maintenance

entry.title: Issue with MultiInput Not Accepting Multiple Values in SAPUI5
entry.content:
I am experiencing an issue with the sap.m.MultiInput control in my SAPUI5 application. The control is not allowing multiple values (tokens) to be entered, even though similar code works correctly in the SAPUI5 SDK.

Issue Details:
Control Used:
SAPUI5 Version: "1.108.23"

Steps to Reproduce:
Add the following MultiInput control to the XML view:

Run the application and try entering multiple values.
The control does not allow multiple values, even though the same code works in the SAPUI5 SDK.
Expected Behavior:
The MultiInput should allow multiple values (tokens) to be entered manually.

Actual Behavior:
The control behaves like a regular input field and does not tokenize multiple entries.

Additional Debugging Done:
Checked for UI version conflicts.
Verified that MultiInput is properly initialized.
Ensured there are no event conflicts in tokenUpdate.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Announcements & Context Data

Thank you very much!

Marie

entry.title: Re: XCO Library : Custom entity creation

entry.title: Re: CAT2 is showing error message
entry.content: Please check the KP26 for 2025 by fiscal period and show a screenshot. Also try posting directly with KB21N and see if you get the same error.

entry.title: Do you know how use SAP Commerce Cloud tools, like SmartEdit, to create or edit the web content?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Creating and Configuring Web Content for SAP Commerce Cloud learning journey.

Overview
This course is part of the overall training arc for beginner business users of SAP Commerce Cloud. The present course focuses on the Web Content Manager role, and explains how Web Content Managers use SAP Commerce Cloud tools, like SmartEdit, to create or edit the web content on the storefront. 

Learning objectives
At the end of this course, beginner business users responsible for web content management will be able to: 

  • Breakdown the theoretical foundation for web content management in SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Perform basic tasks in SmartEdit, like editing and synchronizing web pages, and collaborating in workflows.
  • Perform advanced web content management tasks in SmartEdit, such as using shared components and shared content slots, capturing version snapshots and managing storefront navigation options.
  • Construct a tailored user experience on the storefront by using personalization options in SmartEdit.

Prerequisites

  • Understanding the Purpose of SAP Commerce Cloud, its Components and User Roles

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: @ThomasNagel please be sure to join Interest Groups | SAP Community to engage on topics! Best of luck!

entry.title: Re: Rebates (Condition Contracts) Partial Settlements with individual business volume

Hi @arindamsur

Regards

Hari

entry.title: How to assign dynamic navigation parameters in SAP Fiori Notification?
entry.content:
I want to display a user's SuccessFactors to-do list as notifications in a Fiori application.

I am fetching data via the SuccessFactors API, and the response contains dynamic navigation links for each to-do task. In my requirement for a notification app, when a user clicks on a notification, it should navigate to the corresponding SuccessFactors task link.

My question is: How do I assign these dynamic links, fetched from the SuccessFactors API, to each notification?

While creating notifications, we define navigation properties, but I suppose that only works for static links.

To create notifications, I am using the CREATE_NOTIFICATIONS method of the class /IWNGW/CL_NOTIFICATION_API. I have also created a notification provider class that inherits from the /IWNGW/IF_NOTIF_PROVIDER interface.

Any guidance on how to achieve this would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Business Content SAP Signavio Process Insights: Getting Started
entry.content:
funny enough i ended up again on this note 🙂 

a very important step is missing to enable the APIs to work:

add the https header:

entry.title: Re: Period End Processing - Bookable Period Later than Va...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

When you run the period-end processing via Manage Time off Calendars, if you want to close the 2024 account you would need to select New Calendar- Period End Processing, and then try to input Start date as 8th Jan 2024 and end date 7th Jan 2025. Hope this helps.


Iulia

entry.title: Re: About the Coffee Corner – JOIN now, it’s interesting and fun!
entry.content:
Great idea this group, i've just brewed a brown one 😅 
Are there other people of german worker councils here maybe? A best current practise for such users might be useful. Best wishes from Dortmund.

entry.title: Re: Mongo ODBC Connection - failing to connect, Crystal 2...
entry.content:
Hello,

Product and R&D Teams got back to me.

Currently the Mongo DB ODBC/JDBC client is only supported in BOE/CRS Universe connector. Universe Designer is not a stand alone App, requires BOE and possibly CR Server to Design and save the Universe in it's Repository.

They did say it will be supported in CR 2015, not sure what the release date is for it....

Don

entry.title: SAP Field Service Management 2502: Advanced AI, Planning Simulations, and PM Order Integration
entry.content:
SAP Field Service Management 2502 builds on our strategic investment in AI for field service organizations, introducing advanced planning simulations, expanded multilingual AI support, and the ability to query jobs based on user-defined fields (UDFs) and custom label translations.

This release also delivers a native integration with SAP Plant Maintenance (PM) orders using SAP Integration Suite for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, further strengthening customers' integration landscapes.

Additionally, 2502 brings several usability and workflow enhancements, simplifying daily operations while boosting efficiency for planners, dispatchers, and field technicians.

In this blog, we’ll explore the most notable SAP FSM 2502 features, along with demo videos showcasing key highlights.

👉 For the complete list of all features in the 2502 release, click here.

Key Highlights in SAP Field Service Management 2502:

  • Planning Simulations – Review proposed scheduling changes and compare different scheduling policies.
  • Generative AI – Multilingual support (all languages except Tamil) and natural language filtering using UDFs and custom label translations.
  • AI-Based Scheduling – Gain deeper insights into auto-scheduling decisions.
  • Integration – Standard integration with SAP PM orders for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition, plus service contract integration.
  • Smartforms Enhancements – Add Smartforms to Service Calls, filter by Smartforms, and edit forms from the Partner Portal.
  • Service Map Enhancements – Support for up to 250 activities/day* and localized units (kilometers/miles).
  • Expanded Language Support – Now supporting Catalan, Croatian, Greek, Kazakh, Serbian (Latin), Slovenian, and Ukrainian.

Note: The Activity Summary, Equipment Insights, and Natural Language Filtering features require a customer to be licensed for SAP AI Units. For more information about licensing, please contact your SAP Account Executive.

*Requires HERE Maps routing service.


Artificial Intelligence


Planning Simulations

SAP Field Service Management 2502 introduces Planning Simulations, empowering schedulers to review proposed scheduling changes and compare different scheduling policies before finalizing assignments. This enhancement provides greater control and flexibility, ensuring optimized workforce utilization. Learn more about this feature here.

Planning Simulations

Natural Language Filtering – Additional Language, UDF, & Translation Support

A major enhancement in this release is Natural Language Filtering, which now supports custom label translations and UDF-based searches. This allows organizations to search using company-specific terminology and in their preferred language, enabling a more localized and intuitive AI experience. Find out more details here.

Translation and UDF support for Natural Language Filtering

Generative AI capabilities are now available in all supported languages (except Tamil), making AI-driven insights more accessible to global users. See the full details here.

Expanded multi-lingual support for Generative AI features

AI Impact

According to SAP customer benchmarking, field service organizations leveraging these AI-powered features achieve:

⬆️ 12.5% increase in dispatcher productivity
⬆️5% improvement in first-time fix rates
⬇️ 15% reduction in time spent reviewing and planning service requests

Deeper Insights into Auto-Scheduling Decisions

Reports for AI-based scheduling now offer greater transparency and control, giving planners visibility into technician assignments, travel times, and re-optimization iterations. Detailed scheduling reports provide insights into how decisions are made, improving transparency and increasing autonomy to fine-tune scheduling policies with confidence. Explore this enhancement further here.

Deeper Insights into Auto-Scheduling Decisions


Integration


Integration with Plant Maintenance Orders in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition

New out-of-the-box integration using SAP Integration Suite connects maintenance planning with scheduling and dispatch, ensuring real-time synchronization between SAP S/4HANA PM orders and SAP FSM. This simplifies integration by reducing custom development efforts and ensuring scalability and consistency across IT landscapes. Read the full details here.

Plant Maintenance order integration with SAP FSM

 Integration flow

Integration of Service Contracts

Service contract synchronization between SAP S/4HANA and SAP FSM ensures real-time access to contract data, SLAs, and response times. This reduces integration complexity, improves performance, and enhances service execution by ensuring field service teams have the right contract details at the right time. Check out the documentation here.

User Experience & Usability Enhancements


Expanded Language Support

SAP FSM now supports Catalan, Croatian, Greek, Kazakh, Serbian (Latin script), Slovenian, and Ukrainian, enabling more users to work in their preferred language. Click here to see all supported languages.

Expanded Language Support - Catalan, Croatian, Greek, Kazakh, Serbian (Latin script), Slovenian, and Ukrainian

 

Master Data Management

Equipment: Improved UX and Measurement Points

With expanded on-screen insights, Equipment Master Data now provides richer details on service history, measurement points, and overdue services, giving users a complete historical view to support well-informed planning. See more here. 

Equipment Master Data Updates

Smartforms

Add Smartforms to Service Calls & Filter by Smartforms

Previously, adding Smartforms to Service Calls or searching for them was not possible, making it difficult to locate specific forms in large lists. Now, Planners and Schedulers can add Smartforms to Service Calls, search for them, and view their status, reducing time spent managing large volumes of forms. For additional insights, click here.

Add Smartforms to Service Calls & Filter by Smartforms

Manage Smartforms in the Partner Portal

Partner Managers can now view, edit, and save Smartforms directly within the Partner Portal, providing greater flexibility when managing technician activities. This enhancement allows Smartforms to be completed on behalf of technicians, improving workflow efficiency and ensuring accurate data validation before closing activities.

Manage Smartforms in the Partner Portal

Service Map

Enhanced Routing with HERE Maps

Dispatchers can now visualize routes for up to 250 activities per day using the HERE Maps routing service, overcoming previous Google Maps limitations. This enhancement improves route planning and visibility, especially when managing high-volume job assignments. More info here.

Enhanced Routing with HERE Maps

Service Map Localization for Distance Units

The Service Map now automatically adjusts distance units based on the user's standard regional preferences, displaying miles or kilometers depending on the region. This enhancement improves usability and localization, ensuring dispatchers and technicians see distances in their preferred unit of measurement. More details here.

Service Map Localization for Distance Units

Final Thoughts

SAP Field Service Management 2502 enhances the entire field service value chain with AI-driven planning simulations, standard SAP S/4HANA PM integration, and usability improvements that simplify daily operations.

We invite you to explore these new capabilities, share your feedback, and help shape the future of SAP FSM by submitting your influence requests here. Stay tuned—even more innovations are on the way in 2505!

Thoughts or questions? Feel free to share any feedback in a comment. It would also be great to hear directly from you which innovations you think could be the most impactful for future releases. For related posts and more information, please join our SAP Field Service Management Community page and explore our SAP Field Service Management Website. You can also watch the SAP Field Service Management 2502 Release Demo here, and I encourage you to register for our upcoming webinars for the most up to date information by registering here.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic assignment variant for Field-symbols not allowed
entry.content: No, CL_FDT_SERVICES is not released either. I checked in BTP ABAP environment trial. I guess it's the same status in S/4HANA Cloud.

entry.title: Re: CLMM MASS UPDATE CLASS TYPE 013 Classification Contro...
entry.content: Check in your Customizing for 'Classification Only Allowed in Master Record' in Customizing transaction O1CL : for Object Table KKRAMERK Class Type 013

@Dan_Wroblewski Thanks for the blog. It is really helpful.

I have one query. Is there a way we can determine whether a process instance is waiting for a particular API? I want to first check it before actually making the API call.

entry.title: Re: Is there any standard module available to convert JSO...
entry.content: I was able to achieve this through mapping using external jar files. (JSON to XML). Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Reason code and movement type in SAP EWM

嗨 Shailesh，

请问具体如何使用此方法？

/SCWM/IF_EX_ERP_GOODSMVT~CHANGE_MATDOC

entry.title: Re: SAP Asset Manager 2405 – Requesting Camera & Micropho...
entry.content:
You need to request the permission through the NativeScript API or use a plugin that do that for you. Without asking for permission, it wouldn't request the permission automatically.

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/59037893/runtime-request-permission-in-nativescript-android-app

entry.title: How ERP Movement Type is being determined from EWM
E1STASM segment not included in idoc
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to send an idoc from SAP, but each time segment E1STASM that should be included in the idoc is not there. Change pointers are set for STUE object but apparently they are not taken into account. What can be done in order to send idoc with E1STASM segment?

entry.title: Re: Attach paste in adaptation project
entry.content: check if oTable is the m table.

entry.title: Re: Connecting to your Document Service Repository (neo)
entry.content:
Hi Ivan,

Could you help me with a question? We are trying to back up the documents stored in the repository by downloading them to a local disk. However, we noticed that the option to download the folder is disabled

And when trying to do it via the console, we frequently encounter a connection error:

What would you recommend in this case? Do you know if the folder download option can be enabled through permissions or something similar?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How to Edit and Annotate an Image in SAP MDK?
entry.content: No, there is no functionality to directly edit base 64 strings

entry.title: Re: Styling Issues with Extended Headers in Card Collection - MDK App
entry.content: What version of MDK are you using and on what platform?

entry.title: Saving workbooks in the role
entry.content:
Hello team, our developers need to have option to save workbooks in Analysis for Office under menu roles. 

We created test role for it with S_RS_AO and S_USER_AGR in it. We restricted S_USER_AGR with specific role - as only user management team can have "*" on ACT_GROUP. Developer can only save workbook locally at the moment. Error message states: No authorization to create role entry. Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Confirm produced goods via SOAP API
entry.content: Hi Henry, im already trying to achieve this, but i can't get the update-request to work. Here is what im using: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <n0:ProductionLotsBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1 xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global"> <BasicMessageHeader/> <ProductionLot> <ProductionLotID>2272</ProductionLotID> <ProductionLotUUID>2bc804d8-8451-1eef-bdb7-2eb880c6ba29</ProductionLotUUID> <ConfirmationGroup> <ConfirmationGroupUUID>2bc804d8-8451-1eef-bdb7-2ed49df15a29</ConfirmationGroupUUID> <ProductionTask> <ProductionTaskID>6752</ProductionTaskID> <ProducionTaskUUID>2bc804d8-8451-1eef-bdb7-2ed49df43a29</ProducionTaskUUID> </ProductionTask> <ReportingPoint> <ReportingPointUUID>2bc804d8-8451-1eef-bdb7-2ed49df0fa29</ReportingPointUUID> <ConfirmedQuantity unitCode="EA">1</ConfirmedQuantity> </ReportingPoint> </ConfirmationGroup> </ProductionLot> </n0:ProductionLotsBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1>

entry.title: Re: Confirm produced goods via SOAP API
entry.content: and the error response: <soap-env:Envelope xmlns:soap-env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/"><soap-env:Header/><soap-env:Body><soap-env:Fault><faultcode>soap-env:Client</faultcode><faultstring xml:lang="en">Web service processing error; more details in the web service error log on provider side (UTC timestamp 20250228151139; Transaction ID CDF2350B423B1EEFBDBCC9E929554B27)</faultstring><detail/></soap-env:Fault></soap-env:Body></soap-env:Envelope>

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2502 Release Highlights
entry.content:
Before we dive into one details of SAP CPQ 2502 release I wanted to remind you that registration for CWG Spring 2025 Conference in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, United States is open and that you can benefit from early bird registration in next two weeks!SAP CPQ 2502 brings:

  • New REST API for Managing Products
  • Editability of Cost in Quote 2.0 
  • VCPS Integration Improvements 
  • Business Partner Standard Fields UX improvements
  • Quote Custom Sections
  • Alternative & Variant Item Types
  • Multilevel Products Change Processes (BRIM)
  • Add SubItem Improvement 
  • Quote Fields and Calculations Page

...and much more! So let's dig in!


New REST API for Managing Products 

Starting 2502 CPQ admins can synchronize products using the new REST API with improved performance and a new bulk endpoint. The ProductIntegration REST API supports all that was supported in previous SOAP versions and much more. 
 
Check out swagger for this API. Documentation is published in help as well. 
 

Editability of Cost in Quote 2.0 

We recognize how critical it is for our customers to manage standard cost values dynamically. With this release, the cost column in Quote 2.0 can now be scripted, unlocking new opportunities for advanced integration scenarios. 


   

VCPS Integration Improvements 

Backend characteristics that have dynamic domain are now represented in CPQ I na more intuitive way as their original data type persisted.  
 
Knowledge base synchronization process is enchased to allow deleting obsolete KB data and corresponding product and product versions in CPQ.  
 

 

Business Partner Standard Fields UX improvements 

While it was possible to define editability and visibility for business partner custom fields all standard fields were both visible and editable. Business partners area covered with responsive templates recently, but still overall idea is to move towards configurations rather than customizations. 
 
Under Setup ->   Business Partners -> Business Partner Fields, CPQ admins now can: 

  • Define which fields are visible for different user types and/or permission groups 
  • Define which fields are editable for different user types and/or permission groups 


Read more on this in help page for Business Partners. 
  

Quote Custom Sections 

Admins can now create sections on Quote tabs in Quote 2.0 to logically group custom fields and quote tables based on business needs. Rather than customizing templates CPQ admin can leverage out of the box capability to configure sections in quote, decide on which tab to show that section and assign quote custom fields and quote tables to them. 
 
Just navigate to Setup   Quotes  Fields, Calculations, Layout   Custom Sections and select Add New option to get to this page: 
 

 
At any point in time content of the section can be reordered using drag and drop. 

 
What is still not possible is to move standard fields to custom sections and vice versa but if this is something you would appreciate, please do not hesitate to let us know in the comments.  
 
More details can be found in this help page, 
 

Alternative & Variant Item Types 

In Quote 2.0 since a while have base and optional item types but to ease migration of existing Quote 1.0 customers where we also had additional item types in this release, we are bringing to the new quoting engine: 

  • Alternative Item type 
  • Variant Item type 

Item types can be set on root items and are properly handled not to contribute to quote totals. Read here how to enable new item types in SAP CPQ. 

Multilevel Products Change Processes (BRIM) 

Customers selling multilevel solutions using SAP CPQ and SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management. 
 
Supported scenarios: 

 

 

 

Add SubItem Improvement 

The Add SubItem action allows users to include sub-items under a parent product within the quote. This feature is useful when managing complex configurations or bundles that require hierarchical structures. 

Check out detailed documentation how to enable this awesome functionality. 

Quote Fields and Calculations Page 

Management of quote item custom fields is now moved to Quote 2.0 specific section in setup “Fields, Calculation, Layout”  

 
In case you observed that implementing some feature is missing please share your request with us using SAP Customer Influence portal

entry.title: Re: Confirm produced goods via SOAP API
entry.content: and the error log inside the SAP-System: Unexpected element -el=ProductionLotsBundleMaintainRequest_sync_V1 ns=http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global

entry.title: Re: Confirm produced goods via SOAP API
entry.content: And thank you for your response! Maybe you can help me another time, it would be highly appreciated...Have a nice day!

entry.title: Re: Build and Run Multi-Tenant SaaS Solutions on the SAP BTP
entry.content:
Update February 2025

The February-Update of the Partner Reference Application “Poetry Slam Manager” delivers a significant simplification of the development journey for multi-tenant applications and adds guidance to complement the standard app by customer-specific extensions.

In Detail:

  • New developer journey: With the latest update we refactored the code branches of the repository and we removed the single-tenant deployment to simplify the incremental development towards a scalable multi-tenant application runtime setup.
    In result we now have a simplified setup with two code branches:
    • Branch main-multi-tenant with a focus on business models, business logic, web apps and the enhancements for multi-tenant deployments.
    • Branch main-multi-tenant-features with all ERP integrations and additional features and BTP services included.
  • With the main-multi-tenant branch we now show how to integrate SAP Work Zone, standard edition to provide a central application launchpad and shell header with functions such as theming and personalization for multi-tenant applications. 
  • A new chapter about Cloud Foundry scaling explains possibilities to optimize the configuration of the Cloud Foundry runtime for load- and cost optimization.
  • The ability to deliver customer-specific extensions in multi-tenant applications is key for the market success of every standard application.
    The chapter Extensibility enablement in the partner reference application explains how to enable customer-specific extensions for your multi-tenant app and how to define which entities and services shall be extensible.
    Additionally we published a new GitHub repository Partner Reference Application Extension 'Catering Management' with a sample customer-specific extension for the Poetry Slam Manager application. This repository explains exactly how to build, deploy and run extensions for multi-tenant applications.

Please be welcome to join our breakout session "AI-driven Features and Customer-specific Extensions in Multi-Tenant BTP Solutions" and our "SAP Build" demo booth at the SAP Partner Summit for Midmarket in Orlando and Barcelona for more details about recent updates.

entry.title: Re: BI IP - use of referenced InfoObjects in aggregation...
entry.content: Hi Gregor, thank you for this explanation. I checked again and made some changes, now it looks like result is fine. I don't know exactly what was the problem, I think I mixed source and target fields in Aggregation level. BR Gunter

entry.title: Re: CAP: calling an action in a remote service not going...
entry.content: Hello and sorry for the extremenly late reply.

entry.title: How to retain the original file name in SAP PI/PO in a File to SFTP Scenario.
entry.content:
How can I configure the File and SFTP channels to ensure the original file name remains unchanged during file transfer?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to retain the original file name in SAP PI/PO in...
entry.content:
In the receiver SFTP channel try the following set up for the Adapter-Specific Message Attributes:

Use Adapter-Specific Message Attributes → Checked
Namespace → http://sap.com/xi/XI/System/File
Filename → Checked
Filename Attribute Name → FileName

entry.title: Re: Till when SAP will support Focused Build?
entry.content:
Hello,

As you can see in Support by Software Product - SAP for Me , the mainstream support for Solution Manager ends in 31st December 2027.

The PAM for Focused Build mentions the end of Mainstream Maintenance is on the 31st December 2027. You can see this in this link: SAP Product Availability Matrix

There are Solution Manager applications that have extended Maintenance until 31 December of 2030, while others have customer specific maintenance since the 1st of January 2028. The details can be seen at SAP Note 3255311. The Focused Build application is not included in this note.

 

Best regards, 

 

Miguel Ariño

entry.title: Re: How do we call SOLR externally with SSO enabled?
entry.content: Would we need to create a dedicated SID for this?

entry.title: Re: How to assign Contact Person to Business Partner in SAP S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi all, 

regarding "ODATA Service API_BUSINESS_PARTNER for determining Contact Person ID" you can check DB View "V_CONTACT_CUST" for the relationship of the related tables and based on this, you can create your own odata service.

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Sad news, that Joule’s ABAP skills are not supported for S/4HANA OnPrem!

Alternatives:

  • GitHub Copilot | Eclipse Plugin
  • ABAP-AI · GitHub

entry.title: Re: ONB Tasks Completed by Field Blank
entry.content: Thank you. We do have that turned on, we can see who completed the other steps just not the last one.

entry.title: Re: SAP Joule use cases in Treasury
entry.content:
Hi @HiramGarcia

Please also access our SAP Interactive Learning Journey  Financial Business Insights with SAP S/4HANA Cloud and Joule 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Best Matching Technician and Exclusive Reservations
entry.content: We faced a scenario where the Best Matching Technician feature ignored a technician's exclusive reservation (PTO) and assigned an activity to them. How can we prevent assigning activities to technicians and stop suggesting technicians who have exclusive reservations?

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP: Is there a way to filter with additional bi...
entry.content:
Hello @wilson_lee,

In your additionalBinding please make sure the localElement is the field that you have in the current CDS which you use as Filter Logic in your case its "<Old Status>" and element: Should be the field of "<New Status>"  in ZC_STATUS_MAPPING_VH CDS View. Please note these are case Sensitive and make sure you have them correctly maintained. it will work as expected.

entry.title: S4 Public cloud 2408 - 3SL - Customizing tenant ( Creation of Custom Package in ADT )
entry.content:
Hi All

I have a couple of queries regarding CAPM API integration and customization tenant  in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud:

  1. Is it possible to access the CAPM API endpoint from a Fiori app and deploy the app in the Public Cloud Development tenant?
  2. Can we create a custom Z package in the customizing tenant?

Looking forward to your insights on this.

entry.title: Re: How do we call SOLR externally with SSO enabled?
entry.content: oops... forget my last question, I am now clear that we would go through Hybris and not need a dedicated SID.

entry.title: Re: Generate intercompany billing request based on the results of running allocation cycles (S4H Pub
entry.content: Hello, thank you for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts. Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Work Zone launchpad tile points to wrong URL
entry.content:
I created and deployed a UI5 app, and then created a site using the Work Zone standard edition. I added a tile for my app but it loads indefinitely and the console shows an error saying the component.js file couldn't be loaded from the app's address. I verified the ui5AppInfo.json file and found that the cached url doesn't enclude the Business Solution, and only shows the app's ID. When I add the missing part with the debugger the app works fine.

How can I get the ui5AppInfo.json file to get the correct URL?

entry.title: Re: Open/Add/Remove buttons Risk in Subprocess are disabled
entry.content:
Hi @plaban_sahoo,

 

Please try to assign this with current date as timeframe, then it should be working properly.

 

Regards,

Lukasz
